projectOverview.clientDescription: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, get reminders, and the admin team can manage bookings. It should be simple, mobile-friendly, and maybe include reports later.
projectOverview.cleanDescription: An appointment management system that enables customers to self-service book appointments, receive automated reminders, and provides administrators with centralized booking management.
projectOverview.businessGoal: Streamline appointment management processes by providing customers with self-service booking capabilities and administrators with efficient management tools.

objectives: Enable customers to book appointments online without manual intervention
Provide automated reminder notifications to reduce no-shows
Centralize booking management for administrative team
Deliver a responsive, mobile-friendly user experience
Establish foundation for future analytics and reporting capabilities

stakeholders.description: Browses availability and books appointments through the system
Manages bookings, sends reminders, and oversees system operations
Strategic decision-maker for system features and business rules

functionalRequirements.title: Online Appointment Booking
functionalRequirements.description: Customers can search available time slots, select services, and complete bookings
acceptance_criteria: Customers can view available appointment slots
System displays service options and duration

functionalRequirements.title: Automated Reminders
functionalRequirements.description: System sends appointment reminders to customers before scheduled time

functionalRequirements.title: Admin Booking Management
functionalRequirements.description: Admin users can view, modify, and cancel all bookings
acceptance_criteria: Admin can cancel bookings with notifications

functionalRequirements.title: Mobile-Friendly Interface
functionalRequirements.description: Application works seamlessly across all device sizes
acceptance_criteria: Fast load times on mobile networks

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Mobile Responsiveness
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: System must provide seamless experience on phones, tablets, and desktops

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Performance
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: Page load time must be under 3 seconds, API response time under 500ms

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Security
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: User data must be encrypted, system must support secure authentication

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Scalability
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: System must support at least 1000 concurrent users

assumptions: Client has email infrastructure for sending reminders
Appointment duration is standard (no variable lengths initially)
Client will provide business hours and holidays
Admin team has email access for notifications
constraints: Initial budget allows for basic features only
acceptanceCriteria: All functional requirements implemented and tested
Mobile responsiveness verified on iOS and Android
User documentation and training materials provided
